name: Gemfields Group Ltd
notes: 25% shareholder in KAGEM Mining Ltd. Key partner for emerald auction strategy.

engagements.subject: FY2024 Production Results Review
engagements.attendees: IDC CEO, KAGEM CEO, Gemfields CFO
engagements.summary: Reviewed FY2024 production results and FY2025 expansion budget.
engagements.outcomes: Approved Phase 3 expansion budget of ZMW 1.85B.
engagements.followUpActions: KAGEM to submit detailed capex plan by November 2024.

name: Ministry of Finance Zambia
organization: Government of the Republic of Zambia
notes: Primary government oversight body for IDC and all SOEs.

engagements.subject: ZESCO Debt Restructuring and Tariff Review
engagements.attendees: IDC CEO, ZESCO CEO, PS Finance, IMF Representative
engagements.summary: Reviewed ZESCO sovereign debt restructuring options with IMF.
engagements.outcomes: Agreed on phased tariff increase roadmap over 24 months.
engagements.followUpActions: ZESCO to submit turnaround plan by December 2024.

name: Bank of Zambia
notes: Regulates ZANACO and other financial sector SOEs.

engagements.subject: Q3 2024 Prudential Review
engagements.attendees: ZANACO CEO, BoZ Director of Banking Supervision
engagements.summary: Quarterly prudential review. Capital adequacy and liquidity ratios reviewed.
engagements.outcomes: All prudential ratios within acceptable limits.
engagements.followUpActions: ZANACO to develop ICAAP framework by Q2 2025.

name: ZICTA
organization: Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority
notes: Regulates ZAMTEL and the broader telecommunications sector.

engagements.subject: QoS Audit and Spectrum Review
engagements.summary: ZICTA QoS audit found ZAMTEL below minimum standards for data speed.
engagements.outcomes: ZAMTEL issued improvement notice with 6-month compliance deadline.
engagements.followUpActions: ZAMTEL to submit QoS improvement plan within 30 days.

name: African Development Bank
notes: Financing Zambia Railways track rehabilitation programme.

engagements.subject: Track Rehabilitation Project Supervision Mission
engagements.attendees: ZRL CEO, AfDB Task Manager, Ministry of Transport PS
engagements.summary: AfDB supervision mission for track rehabilitation project.
engagements.outcomes: Disbursement of tranche 2 approved. Project on schedule.
engagements.followUpActions: ZRL to submit Q4 progress report by January 2025.

name: Copperbelt Mineworkers Union
notes: Represents mineworkers at Mopani Copper Mines and other Copperbelt operations.

engagements.subject: 2024-2025 CBA Negotiations
engagements.attendees: Mopani HR Director, MUZ Secretary General
engagements.summary: 2024-2025 collective bargaining agreement signed with 12% wage increase.
engagements.outcomes: CBA signed for 24 months. Housing allowance increased by 15%.
engagements.followUpActions: Mopani to implement new pay scales from September 2024.
